title: How to access my customers from past jobs and push them into Basic CRM?
excerpt: We’ve been using Monday.com work management for a few months. Where can I find a list of all of the customers? I’ve added the Basic CRM within Monday work management - is it possible to populate those “contacts” with my …

posts.author: ashleysdesign (Eric)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve been using Monday.com work management for a few months. Where can I find a list of all of the customers? I’ve added the Basic CRM within Monday work management - is it possible to populate those “contacts” with my customers?

Thank you!
